## Summary

What changed, and why?

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cd aixlarity-ide && npm run test-aixlarity-quality`
- [ ] `cd aixlarity-ide && npm run test-aixlarity-submission` when Electron artifacts or product identity changed
- [ ] `cd aixlarity-ide && npm run test-aixlarity-ui` when IDE interaction changed

## Product Readiness

- [ ] User-visible behavior is documented or intentionally self-explanatory
- [ ] New agent claims produce evidence, artifacts, transcripts, or screenshots when relevant
- [ ] Provider changes do not expose secrets in bundles, logs, screenshots, or artifacts
- [ ] Risky terminal/browser actions remain gated by approval policy
- [ ] No legacy product naming appears in public surfaces

## Evidence

Link screenshots, terminal transcripts, browser recordings, or artifact exports here.
